title: Butler Students Take Learning to the National Stage During Final Four Weekend
summary_en: As Indianapolis welcomes the 2026 NCAA Men’s Final Four, Butler University students are not just spectators—they are part of the operation.  Through a new course, SPM 390: Special Topics in Sports Media: Large Scale Sports Events – Inside the Road to the Final Four, Butler is turning one of the nation’s biggest sporting events into…
author: Mark Apple
title_cn: 巴特勒大学学生在最终四强赛周末将学习成果带上全国舞台
